mapper.select: SELECT CGCM.CD_VAL AS value , CGCM.CD_DSC AS text FROM CMN_GRP_MST CGM , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CGCM WHERE CGM.GRP_ID = CGCM.GRP_ID AND CGM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND CGCM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND CGM.GRP_ID = 'CMN0109' ORDER BY ETC1 ASC
mapper.insert: /* btchMgmtMapper.insertBatchRequest */ INSERT INTO CMN_BATCH_REQUEST ( BATCH_JOB_ID ,BATCH_REQ_ID ,REQ_DTTM ,EXEC_YN ,EXEC_PARAM ,EXEC_TYPE_CD ,REG_ID ,REG_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,EXCL_DNLD_ID ) VALUES ( #{batchJobId} ,BATCH_JOB_SEQ.nextVal ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,'N' ,#{execParam} ,#{execTypeCd} ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE ,nvl(#{exclDnldId},'') )
mapper.select: /* btchMgmtMapper.getExecBatchCnt */ SELECT count(*) AS cntBatch FROM CMN_EXCL_DNLD_HST A , CMN_FILE_DNLD_MGMT_MST B , CMN_BATCH_REQUEST C , CMN_BATCH_EXEC_HST D WHERE A.EXCL_DNLD_ID = B.EXCL_DNLD_ID(+) AND A.EXCL_DNLD_ID = C.EXCL_DNLD_ID AND C.BATCH_REQ_ID = D.BATCH_REQ_ID(+) AND TO_CHAR(A.EXCL_STRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND (C.EXEC_YN='N' OR (C.EXEC_YN='Y' AND D.STAT_CD='ING')) AND A.USR_ID = #{sessionUserId}
